name: steno-memory
description: Persistent long-term memory for Claude. Remembers your facts, preferences, people, projects, and decisions across all conversations.
long_description:
Steno gives Claude persistent memory that works across every conversation. It extracts atomic facts from what you share, builds a knowledge graph of entities and relationships, and retrieves relevant memories using 6-signal fusion search (vector, keyword, graph, recency, salience, temporal). Steno handles temporal reasoning, knowledge updates, and contradiction resolution.

Features:
- Automatic fact extraction with entity and relationship detection
- Temporal grounding (eventDate + documentDate on every fact)
- Knowledge updates (newer facts supersede older ones)
- Source chunk preservation for full-context answers
- 6-signal retrieval with configurable fusion weights

tools.name: steno_remember
tools.description: Store important information in persistent long-term memory

tools.name: steno_recall
tools.description: ALWAYS search memory before answering personal questions about the user

tools.name: steno_feedback
tools.description: Rate whether a recalled memory was useful

openai_key.title: OpenAI API Key
openai_key.description: OpenAI API key for embeddings and extraction

perplexity_key.title: Perplexity API Key (optional)
perplexity_key.description: For cheaper embeddings. Falls back to OpenAI if not set.
